Container.Name: SightReader-AI-Trainer
Container.Overview: Builds curriculum-shaped symbolic sight-reading datasets and trains the Transformer model. The container exits when the selected job finishes, while generated datasets and model checkpoints stay in the mapped data path.
Container.Requires: For GPU training, install the Unraid Nvidia-Driver plugin, set Extra Parameters to --runtime=nvidia, and expose the NVIDIA variables below. CPU-only training works with the defaults.

Config.Name: Data Path
Config.Description: Persistent folder for generated datasets, vocab files, checkpoints, and models.

Config.Name: Visible GPUs
Config.Description: NVIDIA devices exposed to the container. Use all, a GPU UUID, or leave blank for CPU-only runs.

Config.Name: Driver Capabilities
Config.Description: NVIDIA driver capabilities needed for PyTorch training.

Config.Name: Device
Config.Description: Training device: auto, cuda, or cpu.

Config.Name: Pieces Per Level
Config.Description: Synthetic pieces generated for each curriculum level.

Config.Name: Levels
Config.Description: Optional space-separated levels, for example: 1 2 3. Leave blank for the full curriculum.

Config.Name: Validation Split
Config.Description: Fraction of examples reserved for validation.

Config.Name: Seed
Config.Description: Random seed for dataset generation and training.
